title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify location tracking permission flow during onboarding when user denies permission and selects "Ask Next Time or When I Share" on iOS
steps: Start app for the first time
Log in or continue as guest
Grant location permission with 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' option
expected: Permission popups appear with options: Allow Once, Allow While Using App, Don't Allow (on iOS); Only This Time (on Android). Appropriate navigation occurs between screens.
keywords: Ask Next Time or When I Share
